channel.title: Hubert Huang | Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content on Hubert Huang | Personal Website

item.title: YouBike Statistical Analysis and Forecasting
item.description:
Introduction

This is my side project, and the complete code can be accessed via the GitHub. The following focuses on the research and analysis aspects.

item.title: Real-Time News Summary Platform
item.description:
Preface

This is our final project for the course “Web Application Programming.”

item.title: 2024 TEDxNational Taiwan University Annual Exhibition
item.description:
Brief Introduction

In August 2024, I joined the TEDxNational Taiwan University organizing team as the director of public relations.

item.title: Automated Attendance Data Processing System
item.description: Due to some information in this project being confidential, the complete source code will not be disclosed.

item.title: Introduction to the BA Summer Camp
item.description:
Introduction to the BA Summer Camp

“The BA Summer Camp” stands for “the Business Administration Summer Camp”, and it is specifically organized for Taiwanese high school students to learn about business administration and related fields.

item.title: Introduction to NTU BA
item.description: In the following article, we use “NTU BA” to refer to the department of Business Administration at National Taiwan University.
